languages.title: Chiyankhulo
languages.subtitle: Sankhani chilankhulo chomwe chikugwiritsidwa ntchito mu pulogalamuyi.
languages.noResults: Palibe zilankhulo zomwe zikufanana ndi zomwe mwasaka.

phone.label: Nambala yafoni
phone.searchCountry: Sakani dziko, khodi, kapena mawu oyimba
phone.noCountries: Palibe mayiko omwe akufanana ndi zomwe mumasaka.
phone.invalid: Lowetsani nambala yafoni yovomerezeka ya dziko lomwe mwasankha.
phone.valid: Nambala yafoni yovomerezeka yapadziko lonse lapansi

auth.onboardingTagline: Wothandizira chitetezo changa pakanthawi pakati pa "ndili bwino" ndi "Ndikufuna thandizo."
auth.createSubtitle: Sankhani njira yolowera kuti muteteze graph yanu yachitetezo.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Sitinathe kumaliza kulowa. Onani kulumikizana kwanu ndikuyesanso.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Kugwiritsa ntchito gawo lachitukuko mdera lanu. Native Google Sign-In imagwira ntchito popanga chitukuko.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Lunzani nokha kapena pitilizani ndikuwonjezeranso nthawi ina.
auth.northStarBody: Zovala VL01 zimatha kuyambitsa kuyenda kwa chitetezo ndi matepi ndi manja aatali.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Mnzanu wodekha wachitetezo pamapu komanso pakuyimba foni.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear ikhoza kuthandizira panyumba, njira yomuyang'anira, njira yadzidzidzi, kuyimba foni, ndi mawu.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Amagwiritsidwa ntchito ngati mapu, madera oopsa, kufika bwino, ndi SOS nkhani.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving amafunsa malo kuti athandizi amvetsetse pamene angafunike thandizo. Mutha kusintha izi pambuyo pake mu Zochunira.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Zidziwitso zimathandizira cheke ndi zochitika zadzidzidzi.
permissions.notificationsBody: Timangogwiritsa ntchito zidziwitso pazachitetezo, zosintha mwadzidzidzi, ndi zikumbutso zomwe mumayatsa.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving imagwiritsa ntchito malo omwe muli ngati mapu achitetezo, madera oopsa, kugawana mwachangu, ndi SOS nkhani. Mutha kusintha izi pambuyo pake mu Zochunira.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving imatumiza zikumbutso zolowera, zosintha mwadzidzidzi, ndi zidziwitso zachitetezo zomwe mumayatsa. Sitigwiritsa ntchito zidziwitso pazotsatsa.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving imagwiritsa ntchito cholankhulira chanu pokhapo mutayimba AI mnzanu kapena foni yotetezedwa.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving amagwilitsila nchito Bluetooth kuphatikizana ndi NorthStar zodzikongoletsera, kuwerenga mkhalidwe wa kulumikizana, ndi kuyambitsa kuyenda kwa chitetezo kuchovala.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving imagwiritsa ntchito kamera pokhapo mutasankha kujambula chithunzi cha mbiri yanu kapena kugawana chithunzi chachitetezo.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving imasunga kutuluka uku kupezeka kuchokera ku Zikhazikiko ndi pa bolodi.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Sankhani liwu la mnzako lomwe limamveka bwino kuti limve.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Kuwunika kwachete chitetezo cha tsiku ndi tsiku.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Kupopa kasanu kutha kukwera mpaka SOS ndi machenjezo a alonda.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Yambitsani kuyimba anzanu munthawi yeniyeni mukafuna chithandizo.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Yesani kayendedwe ka chitetezo mu chiwonetsero chotsika.

jewelry.noDevices: Palibe zida zapafupi NorthStar zomwe zapezeka pano.
jewelry.scanFailed: Sitinapeze zodzikongoletsera zapafupi. Yang'anani Bluetooth, khalani NorthStar pafupi, ndi kuyesanso.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth kusanthula sikunayambe. Yang'anani Bluetooth kupeza ndi kuyesanso.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Kufikira pazida zapafupi kuzimitsa. Lolani Bluetooth kulowa mu Zochunira, kenako yesaninso.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar zinatenga nthawi yaitali kuti zigwirizane. Isunthireni pafupi ndikuyesanso.
jewelry.connectFailed: Sitinathe kulumikiza ku NorthStar. Yang'anani ngati yachajitsidwa komanso pafupi, ndiye yesaninso.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Khalani NorthStar ndi chaji ndi pafupi ndi foni iyi, kenaka sikaninso.

home.subtitle: Dashboard yothandizana ndi chitetezo
home.readyBody: Mawu, mapu, zodzikongoletsera, ndi athandizi amangoduliridwa kamodzi.

map.title: Mapu achitetezo
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go chithunzithunzi; Mapbox amapeleka mu kamangidwe kachitukuko.
map.updateFailed: Sitinathe kusintha malo anu. Chonde yesaninso.
map.notRequested: Kulowa malo sikunafunsidwe. Mutha kuyiyambitsa pambuyo pake kuchokera ku Zikhazikiko.
map.permissionOff: Kulowa malo kwazimitsidwa. Yambitsani mu Zochunira kuti pakati pa mapu otetezeka pa inu.
map.timeout: Malo anu akutenga nthawi yayitali kuposa momwe amayembekezera. Pitani kwinakwake ndi chizindikiro chomveka bwino ndikuyesanso.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Malo odalirika omwe mumasunga awoneka pano kuti muwapeze mwachangu.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Yambani kuyimba kapena lembani uthenga mukakonzeka.

history.clearMessage: Izi zimachotsa AI mauthenga amzake osungidwa pachidachi.
history.title: Mbiri ya zokambirana
history.subtitle: AI mauthenga amnzake osungidwa pa chipangizochi.
history.emptyMessage: Zokambirana za AI za mzanu ziziwoneka apa mukayimba koyamba.
history.loadFailed: Sitinathe kuyika mbiri yakale. Chonde yesaninso.
history.clearFailed: Sitinathe kuchotsa mbiri ya zokambirana. Chonde yesaninso.

voices.title: Mawu anga otetezedwa
voices.subtitle: Sankhani liwu la mnzanu lomwe likumva bwino kuti limve.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Mawu awa sanathe kuseweredwa. Chonde yesaninso.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Gwiritsani ntchito mayankho ophatikizana nawo pamene netiweki kapena Hume zidziwitso sizikupezeka.
settings.privacyBody: Tumizani kapena kufufuta zomwe zasungidwa pachidachi.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Izi zimachotsa mbiri yanu, zochunira, olumikizana nawo mwadzidzidzi, mbiri ya zokambirana, zikumbutso za zilolezo, ndi gawo lazolemba zakomweko pachipangizochi.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Sitingathe kuchotsa zidziwitso zapafupi pakali pano.

sections.companionSubtitle: Zokonda pamawu komanso osagwiritsa ntchito intaneti
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, alonda, ndi okhudzana ndi ngozi
sections.privacySubtitle: Mbiri, kutumiza kunja, kufufuta, ndi ndondomeko

settings.updateFailedMessage: Sitinathe kusunga zomwe amakonda. Chonde yesaninso.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Gawo lanu likugwirabe ntchito. Chonde yesaninso.

contacts.title: Macheza adzidzidzi
contacts.subtitle: Anthu odalirika amapezeka panthawi yachitetezo.
contacts.name: Dzina
contacts.empty: Palibe olumikizana nawo mwadzidzidzi omwe adawonjezedwa.
contacts.emptyMessage: Onjezani munthu amene mumamukhulupirira kuti akhale okonzeka pamene chitetezo chikumufuna.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Sitinathe kusunga munthuyu. Onani zambiri ndikuyesanso.

friends.title: Abwenzi
friends.subtitle: Oyang'anira, zopempha, ndi chithunzi chadzidzidzi.
friends.emptyMessage: Abwenzi odalirika ndi owasamalira awoneka pano akawonjezedwa.

emergency.title: Zadzidzi SOS
emergency.subtitle: Kukwerani pokhapokha ngati mukufuna thandizo lachangu.
emergency.body: Izi zidziwitsa mayendedwe anu otetezedwa ndikukonzekera anthu olumikizana nawo mwadzidzidzi.
emergency.addContact: Onjezani wolumikizana nawo mwadzidzidzi mu Zikhazikiko.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Zigawo zogawana malo zakonzeka. Lumikizani backend share endpoint kuti mutumize maulalo amoyo.

capybearTap.title: Capybear pompani
capybearTap.subtitle: Dinani kawiri NorthStar yanu kuti mugwetse lalanje lachitetezo.
capybearTap.body: Njira yolumikizira ndi yokonzeka kuyimbira zochitika za BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Mukuwoneka ngati mulibe intaneti. Uthenga wanu udzatumizidwa mukalumikizanso.
errors.voiceQueued: Uthenga wasungidwa. Idzatumizidwa pamene bwenzi la mawu likugwirizananso.
errors.microphone: Kupeza maikolofoni ndikofunikira pakuyimba kwamawu. Mutha kuyiyambitsa mu Zochunira, kapena lembani uthenga m'malo mwake.
errors.billing: Mnzake wapaintaneti sakupezeka kwakanthawi. Mutha kupitiliza ndi mnzanu wapaintaneti.
errors.authentication: Wolankhula naye sanatsimikizire gawoli. Lowaninso muakaunti yanu kapena gwiritsani ntchito mnzanu wapaintaneti pakadali pano.
errors.timeout: Mnzake wa mawu adatenga nthawi yayitali kuti asayankhe. Onani kulumikizana kwanu ndikuyesanso.
errors.network: Sitinathe kufikira mnzathu wa mawu. Yang'anani kulumikizidwa kwanu, kenako yesaninso kapena pitilizani osalumikizidwa pa intaneti.
errors.genericVoice: Chinachake chinasokoneza kuyimba kwa mawu. Yesaninso, kapena pitilizani ndi mnzanu wapaintaneti.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving ikufunika mwayi wolandila maikolofoni kuti itetezeke komanso AI kuyimbana ndi anthu.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving imagwiritsa ntchito malo omwe muli pamapu achitetezo ndi zachitetezo chapafupi.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving amagwiritsa Bluetooth kulumikiza NorthStar zodzikongoletsera zachitetezo.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Njira yolowera imeneyi sikupezeka mu mtundu uwu.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Demo imagwiritsa ntchito deta yabodza yosungidwa pa chipangizochi yokha. Ntchito zolumikizidwa sizinatsimikizidwe, ndipo gawoli limayambiranso pulogalamuyi ikatsegulidwanso.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Khodi yotsimikizira ndi yolakwika kapena yatha ntchito. Pemphani khodi yatsopano ndipo yesaninso.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Mwayesa kulowa kambirimbiri. Dikirani pang'ono, kenako yesaninso.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Kutsimikizira kulowa kwatenga nthawi yaitali. Onani intaneti yanu ndipo yesaninso.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Sitinathe kufikira ntchito yolowera. Onani intaneti yanu ndipo yesaninso.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Mapu achitetezo sanathe kutseguka. Onani intaneti yanu ndipo yesaninso.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Malo apompopompo sakupezeka. Tikuwonetsa malo anu omaliza kusungidwa a pa %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Sitinathe kugawana malo anu. Onani chilolezo cha malo ndipo yesaninso.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Awa ndi malo anga ojambulidwa pa %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Awa ndi malo anga omaliza kusungidwa, ojambulidwa pa %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Chilolezo cha Bluetooth chatsekedwa. Chitseguleni mu Zokonda, kenako yesaninso.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Kulumikiza ndi Bluetooth sikupezeka pa chipangizochi kapena mu mtundu uwu.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Sitinathe kupeza NorthStar. Isungeni pafupi, onani Bluetooth, ndipo yesaninso.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Palibe zida za NorthStar zomwe zapezeka pafupi. Isungeni pafupi ndipo fufuzaninso.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Sitinathe kulumikizana ndi NorthStar. Onetsetsani kuti ili ndi chaji komanso ili pafupi, kenako yesaninso.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Poyimbira pa foni patseguka; kuyimba sikunatsimikizidwe.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Panalibe munthu wolumikizana naye pa ngozi; palibe foni yomwe inayimbidwa.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Poyimbira pa foni sinathe kutseguka; palibe foni yomwe inayimbidwa.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Kuyesa komaliza kwa SOS sikunathe kutsimikizidwa.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Wothandizira wamawu sakupezeka panopa. Yesaninso nthawi ina kapena pitirizani ndi wothandizira wopanda intaneti.
releaseCritical.editContactTitle: Sinthani munthu wolumikizana naye pa ngozi
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Munthu wolumikizana naye pa ngozi wasinthidwa.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.
